    ' at line: 135, column: 5

ruleCase.then: count(sector[@vocabulary='' or @vocabulary='1' or not(@vocabulary)]) = count(sector[@vocabulary='' or @vocabulary='1' or not(@vocabulary)]/@percentage)

ruleInfo.message: When multiple sectors, within a vocabulary (e.g. 1 - OECD DAC) are declared, each must have a percentage.
